fileContext.overview: This file, `indexer.ts`, is responsible for building a semantic index of a codebase, which includes a flat symbol index, a file index, and an inverted keyword index. It aggregates data from individual file analyses and dependency graphs to provide a comprehensive understanding of the codebase.

symbols.name: buildIndex
symbols.purpose: Builds a semantic index from file contexts and dependency graphs.
symbols.behavior: Iterates over file contexts, extracts symbol information, and constructs the index.
symbols.limitations: Requires file contexts and dependency graphs as input.

symbols.name: persistIndex
symbols.purpose: Persists the semantic index to a file.
symbols.behavior: Writes the index to a JSON file.
symbols.limitations: Requires a valid semantic index as input.

symbols.name: persistContextOverview
symbols.purpose: Generates a context overview file from the semantic index and dependency graph.
symbols.behavior: Constructs a markdown file with codebase statistics, usage instructions, and file overviews.
symbols.limitations: Requires a valid semantic index and dependency graph as input.

symbols.name: indexKeywords
symbols.purpose: Indexes keywords from symbol purposes and behaviors.
symbols.behavior: Extracts meaningful words from text and stores them in a keyword index.
symbols.parameters: sym: SymbolContext, filePath: string, keywords: Record<string, string[]>
symbols.limitations: Requires a symbol context, file path, and keyword index as input.

symbols.name: extractMeaningfulWords
symbols.behavior: Removes stop words, punctuation, and short words from text.

symbols.name: inlineOverview
symbols.purpose: Formats an overview string for inline use in a markdown list item.
symbols.behavior: Collapses newlines, truncates text, and falls back to a placeholder if empty.
symbols.limitations: Requires a string or undefined as input.
